3148050.name: Decay of Opulence
3148050.description:
Explore a post-apocalyptic world in this 1-bit pixel art horror RPG. A divine cataclysm shattered reality, killing countless and driving the survivors into madness. In the wake of this disaster, the small rural town you once called home is overrun by two rival cults.

Key Features:

  • Choose Your Survivor: Play as Simon, a reclusive writer haunted by the past, or Rebecca, a runaway seeking refuge from her broken family.

  • Turn-Based Tactical Combat: Use strategy to target specific enemy body parts in battle. Equip two one-handed weapons or wield a powerful two-handed weapon and strike where it counts.

  • 1-Bit Pixel Art: Experience the chilling atmosphere in stylized, 1-bit pixel art.

  • Original Soundtrack: Immerse yourself in the atmospheric score composed by DignifiedDonut.

In a world where reality has broken and survival is a constant battle, how will you live on? Will you defeat the cults and uncover the secrets behind the divine cataclysm, or succumb to madness?
